text:
Ustekinumab or vedolizumab may be considered.

Adjunctive antibiotic therapy in perineal fistulizing Crohn's disease
9
Metronidazole 30 mg/kg/day, orally in 2 to 3 doses + ciprofloxacin 20 mg/kg/day, orally, in 2 doses.
